title: [BUG] Cell.fill.fgColor not processing properly in Libre/Excel
author: Thunderpat45

comments.author: 3ximus
comments.body:
I had the same exact issue and the problem is that the color hex value should not have the hashtag. If that's the case for you change it to this
`fgColor: { argb: '#FFBFBFBF' }`    // error
`fgColor: { argb: 'FFBFBFBF' }`     // correct
